welcome.description: This is a Next.js application with internationalization support, authentication, and modern UI components.

admin.companiesDescription: Manage companies, their sites and service providers.
admin.usersDescription: Manage users, their roles and assignments.

companies.title: Company Management
companies.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone

hero.title: STAAMINA MAKES MALFUNCTIONS MANAGEABLE.
hero.subtitle: THE MAINTENANCE SOLUTION TO INTELLIGENTLY MANAGE INCIDENTS ACROSS YOUR STORES.
hero.description: BREAKDOWNS ARE COSTLY. LACK OF VISIBILITY IS EVEN MORE SO.

features.title: FEATURES IN SERVICE OF COLLECTIVE PERFORMANCE
features.subtitle: Every feature aligns your teams and accelerates execution.

aiDeclaration.title: AI-Assisted Incident Declaration
aiDeclaration.description: Simply describe the problem — Staamina structures the information and triggers the right process.

intelligentRouting.title: Intelligent & Automatic Routing
intelligentRouting.description: Automatic routing of incidents to the right responder, via the right channel and the right process.

realTimeData.title: Real-Time Data & Tracking
realTimeData.description: All data is continuously updated to manage activity with precision.

mapping.title: Environment Mapping
mapping.description: Visualize all your sites, equipment, and responders in a clear, structured view.

unifiedRepository.title: Unified Business Repository
unifiedRepository.description: Every incident is contextualized through a complete, structured business repository.

unifiedCommunication.title: Unified Communication & Integration
unifiedCommunication.description: All incident-related exchanges, unified and synchronized with your existing tools.

carousel.detailDescription: A UNIQUE PLATFORM TO MANAGE INFRASTRUCTURE MAINTENANCE, REGARDLESS OF BUSINESS SECTOR.

retail.introDescription: In retail networks, performance relies on always operational infrastructures. Staamina enables centralized management and reliable maintenance of all point-of-sale equipment.

restaurant.introDescription: In the restaurant industry, any breakdown can impact service and customer experience. Staamina helps teams ensure continuity of critical infrastructures, from dining room to kitchen.

fitness.introDescription: In retail networks, performance relies on always operational infrastructures. Staamina enables centralized management and reliable maintenance of all point-of-sale equipment.

agencies.introDescription: In agency networks, infrastructure reliability determines customer service quality. Staamina provides a centralized view of maintenance to efficiently manage all points of sale.

health.introDescription: In health and proximity establishments, every malfunction matters. Staamina secures tracking and maintenance of equipment essential to proper site operation.

hospitality.introDescription: In hospitality and reception venues, infrastructure continuity is a key customer satisfaction factor. Staamina centralizes maintenance to ensure sites are always operational.

problemStatement.text: A STORE IS COMPLEX. ACROSS A NETWORK, COMPLEXITY BECOMES EXPONENTIAL. YOUR OPERATIONS SHOULDN'T BE.

beforeAfter.title: STAAMINA STRUCTURES AND SIMPLIFIES OPERATIONS FROM INCIDENT DECLARATION TO RESOLUTION.

before.label: WITHOUT STAAMINA
before.tagline: One incident, a chain of steps.

after.label: WITH STAAMINA
after.tagline: ONE SINGLE ENTRY POINT FOR ALL YOUR INCIDENTS.

multiDevice.title: DESIGNED FOR EVERY USER
multiDevice.subtitle: OPTIMIZED FOR EVERY ENVIRONMENT
multiDevice.cta: Built for all operational use cases, Staamina natively adapts to existing environments.

mobile.name: MOBILE & TABLET
mobile.description: An interface designed for the field. For all operational profiles: store, region, audit, technical. Act in real time, on-site, and within reach.

desktop.name: LAPTOP & DESKTOP
desktop.description: A complete interface for central management. Global visibility, real-time monitoring, performance analysis. Manage your providers, validate, and arbitrate with full control.

kiosk.name: POS & KIOSK
kiosk.description: An interface accessible to the entire site team. A simplified experience integrated into your environment. Report and track your requests without friction.

franchise.title: A SOLUTION TO SUPPORT BOTH YOUR BRANCHES AND FRANCHISES

franchisees.title: Efficiently support your franchisees
franchisees.description: Track all your franchisees simply. Provide the right support at the right time. Guarantee a uniform level of quality.

branches.title: Ensure support for your branches
branches.description: Centralize all incidents and field reports. Optimize your team's operations. Master your visibility and efficiency.

whyChoose.title: WHY CHOOSE STAAMINA?
whyChoose.subtitle: Turn your incidents into data, and your data into operational performance.

forSiteOperators.title: For Site Operators & Managers
forSiteOperators.description: Stop struggling with complicated procedures for equipment problems. Staamina makes reporting and tracking issues simple and straightforward.

benefits.noHassle: No more hassle with complex procedures
benefits.quickResolution: Faster problem resolution with clear tracking

forGroupManagers.title: For Group Managers
forGroupManagers.description: Monitor all site issues in real-time from a centralized dashboard. Coordinate efficiently with third-party services and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

benefits.realTimeMonitoring: Real-time monitoring of all site issues

forServiceProviders.title: For Third-Party Service Providers
forServiceProviders.description: Receive all service requests with complete information about equipment details and contact information. Perform interventions efficiently with all the context you need.

benefits.efficientIntervention: Efficient interventions with all necessary details

model360.title: Interactive 3D Preview
model360.subtitle: Drag to rotate and explore our equipment models in 360 degrees

cta.title: WHY CHOOSE STAAMINA?
cta.description: Turn your incidents into data, and your data into operational performance.

seo.title: Staamina - Equipment Maintenance Management Software
seo.description: Streamline equipment maintenance for sites. Real-time monitoring, efficient coordination, and complete information for service providers. Simplify your maintenance procedures today.
